title: Weber drive-in arrival
prompt: Wide drone-style establishing shot from above and to the side. The black @jeep-wrangler already pulled forward into a parking slot at @weber-drive-in — an orange wood-paneled walk-up burger storefront with white pillars, a low awning, and a clearly readable 'DRIVE-IN' sign in vintage neon-style block letters above the order counter. The Jeep's license plate 'SARA AND EVA' is clearly visible on the rear bumper. Bright sunny afternoon, blue sky with a few cotton clouds, asphalt parking lot with painted parking-line stripes. NO HUMAN CHARACTERS in frame yet — just the Jeep parked at the drive-in. From inside the Jeep, faint off-camera kid voice: Eva (excited, off-camera, almost yelling): "FOOD! REAL FOOD!" Sara (off-camera): "It SMELLS like burgers!" The Jeep's engine cuts out.
